payload.text: I'll help you implement the WF3-04-detail-investing feature. Let me start by reading the spec, plan, checklist, and wireframe to understand what needs to be built.
Now let me find and read the wireframe to understand the target layout:
Now let me explore the existing iOS project structure to understand the patterns:

Now I'll begin implementing the feature. Let me start with the data models and protocol:

STEP: 1. Create data models and protocol

input.old_string:
import Foundation

final class HomeDependencies: ObservableObject {
    var userProfile: any UserProfileProviding
    var notificationCenter: any NotificationCenterProviding
    var heroInvesting: any HeroInvestingProviding
    var insights: any InsightsProviding
    var weeklyEvents: any WeeklyEventsProviding

    init(
        userProfile: any UserProfileProviding = MockUserProfileProvider(),
        notificationCenter: any NotificationCenterProviding = MockNotificationCenterProvider(),
        heroInvesting: any HeroInvestingProviding = MockHeroInvestingProvider(),
        insights: any InsightsProviding = MockInsightsProvider(),
        weeklyEvents: any WeeklyEventsProviding = MockWeeklyEventsProvider()
    ) {
        self.userProfile = userProfile
        self.notificationCenter = notificationCenter
        self.heroInvesting = heroInvesting
        self.insights = insights
        self.weeklyEvents = weeklyEvents
    }

    static let mock = HomeDependencies()
}
input.new_string:
import Foundation

final class HomeDependencies: ObservableObject {
    var userProfile: any UserProfileProviding
    var notificationCenter: any NotificationCenterProviding
    var heroInvesting: any HeroInvestingProviding
    var insights: any InsightsProviding
    var weeklyEvents: any WeeklyEventsProviding
    var investingAttitudeDetail: any InvestingAttitudeDetailProviding

    init(
        userProfile: any UserProfileProviding = MockUserProfileProvider(),
        notificationCenter: any NotificationCenterProviding = MockNotificationCenterProvider(),
        heroInvesting: any HeroInvestingProviding = MockHeroInvestingProvider(),
        insights: any InsightsProviding = MockInsightsProvider(),
        weeklyEvents: any WeeklyEventsProviding = MockWeeklyEventsProvider(),
        investingAttitudeDetail: any InvestingAttitudeDetailProviding = MockInvestingAttitudeDetailProvider()
    ) {
        self.userProfile = userProfile
        self.notificationCenter = notificationCenter
        self.heroInvesting = heroInvesting
        self.insights = insights
        self.weeklyEvents = weeklyEvents
        self.investingAttitudeDetail = investingAttitudeDetail
    }

    static let mock = HomeDependencies()
}

input.old_string:
.navigationDestination(for: HomeRoute.self) { route in
                    switch route {
                    case .investing:
                        InvestingPlaceholderView()
                    case .event:
                        EventPlaceholderView()
                    case .today:
                        TodayPlaceholderView()
                    case .tabooPlaceholder:
                        TabooPlaceholderView()
                    case .practicePlaceholder:
                        PracticePlaceholderView()
                    }
                }
input.new_string:
.navigationDestination(for: HomeRoute.self) { route in
                    switch route {
                    case .investing:
                        InvestingAttitudeDetailView(provider: homeDeps.investingAttitudeDetail)
                    case .event:
                        EventPlaceholderView()
                    case .today:
                        TodayPlaceholderView()
                    case .tabooPlaceholder:
                        TabooPlaceholderView()
                    case .practicePlaceholder:
                        PracticePlaceholderView()
                    }
                }

payload.text: STEP: 5. Register files in Xcode project

Let me verify the directory structure and register the files properly by adding them to the pbxproj. I'll need to add new entries for the two new files. Let me create a helper script approach - I'll add the files with their proper IDs:

input.old_string:
A0010205000000000000A205 /* SajuAccessibilityUITests.swift */ = {isa = PBXFileReference; lastKnownFileType = sourcecode.swift; path = SajuAccessibilityUITests.swift; sourceTree = "<group>"; };
/* End PBXFileReference section */

B0010205000000000000A205 /* SajuAccessibilityUITests.swift in Sources */ = {isa = PBXBuildFile; fileRef = A0010205000000000000A205 /* SajuAccessibilityUITests.swift */; };
/* End PBXBuildFile section */
